---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What are you trying to do that this feature would enable?

## Proposed solution

If you have a specific approach in mind, describe it. Otherwise leave blank.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Relation to the llms.txt spec

Does this relate to the [llms.txt specification](https://llmstxt.org/)? If so, cite the relevant section.

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I'd be willing to implement this and submit a PR
- [ ] I'd be willing to test an implementation from a maintainer
- [ ] I'm suggesting the idea but cannot contribute implementation

## Additional context

Screenshots, example output, links to similar features in other modules, etc.
